what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 stroked SVG icon showing an eye with a central circular pupil/iris and surrounding glow or radiance marks.
observations: Uses a single inline SVG with viewBox 0 0 24 24.
Sets fill to none and stroke to currentColor for inherited color styling.
Uses stroke width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Draws the eye outline with one path, the center with a circle, and glow marks with a multi-segment path.
Contains no title, desc, role, class, id, or embedded styling.
standouts: The icon combines an eye symbol with directional glow marks around the perimeter.
All geometry is compactly encoded in three SVG child elements.
The currentColor stroke makes the asset color-adaptive.
conventions: Follows common line-icon conventions: 24x24 viewBox, no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded caps and joins.
Keeps the SVG self-contained without external references or CSS classes.
Combines multiple short glow strokes into one path element.
concerns: No accessible title or description is included in the SVG itself.
The combined glow path makes individual ray segments less independently addressable.
notes: A themable line icon for an eye with added glow emphasis.
questions: Should this icon be treated as decorative or given an accessible label by the consumer?
Are the glow marks intended to mean visibility, focus, insight, or an active/illuminated state?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename implies an eye-glow icon, and the SVG content draws an eye with surrounding glow marks.
intention_signals: It seems intended to communicate seeing, focus, or visual attention with an added glow/active emphasis while remaining usable as a simple stroked UI icon.
novelty: The distinct feature is the added radiance marks around a standard eye outline.
contribution: Provides a compact, color-inheriting visibility/perception icon with glow emphasis that a fused system could keep as a reusable UI symbol.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor stroked SVG line icon depicting an eye with a central circle and surrounding glow rays.
intention_for_embedding: This asset was for representing visibility, perception, focus, or an illuminated eye state in a design system icon set.
